name: causal_discovery
description: Two-stage causal discovery pipeline: time-lagged causal graph inference via Tigramite PCMCI+, followed by symbolic equation discovery on parent sets via PySR. Includes intervention ranking via symbolic sensitivity analysis.
self_test: python -c "from plugins.prometheus.causal_discovery.wrapper import PLUGIN; import asyncio; r=asyncio.run(PLUGIN.invoke({'mode':'self_test'})); assert r.get('valid')"

data.description: 2D array of shape [T, N] — T time steps, N variables.

variable_names.description: Names for each of the N variables.

target_variable.description: Target variable specified by name (string) or column index (integer).

max_lag.description: Maximum time lag to test for causal relationships.

mode.description: Pipeline mode: 'discover' runs only PCMCI+, 'equations' runs only PySR (requires pre-computed parent sets), 'full' runs both stages plus intervention ranking, 'self_test' runs the full pipeline on built-in synthetic manufacturing data.

causal_graph.description: Adjacency structure with edge types and lag information from PCMCI+.

parent_sets.description: Mapping from each variable to its discovered causal parents with lag.

equations.description: Symbolic equations discovered by PySR for the target variable.

intervention_ranking.description: Variables ranked by absolute sensitivity (partial derivative magnitude) of the target equation.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the full pipeline results.
